title: Malty, Molten, Romantic Turkish Cocoa Kofte
description: A Fodmap-friendly Turkish dish featuring cocoa, served in a sashimi-cut style with a malty, molten center, perfect for a romantic evening.

ingredients.name: Almond flour
ingredients.notes: make sure to use a food processor to grind into fine crumbs

ingredients.name: Dark cocoa powder
ingredients.notes: high-quality cocoa with at least 70% cocoa solids

ingredients.name: Coconut sugar
ingredients.notes: you can adjust the amount to your taste

ingredients.name: Unsweetened almond milk
ingredients.notes: you can use water if you prefer

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher or sea salt for the best flavor

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the almond flour, cocoa powder, and coconut sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, unsweetened almond milk, xanthan gum, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Don't overmix!
